moments.author: Brad Garlinghouse
moments.quote: Financial engineering doesn’t drive long‑term value. Utility does
moments.why: Ripple CEO’s direct rebuttal to Michael Saylor stirred debate on crypto value vs speculation.

moments.author: Novak Djokovic
moments.why: Djokovic’s Wimbledon celebration dance went viral after equaling Federer’s match‑win record.

moments.author: Russell Wilson
moments.why: Wilson’s heartfelt video signaled his transition from playing to broadcasting, sparking speculation.
